creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 146247
local use nullfs

Do you mean something like this? It relies on reverse lookup returning "localhost".

$ /etc/autofs/special_hosts localhost
/foo      -fstype=nullfs  :/foo /bar        -fstype=nullfs  :/bar
$ /etc/autofs/special_hosts localhost.my.domain
/foo      -fstype=nullfs  :/foo /bar        -fstype=nullfs  :/bar
$ /etc/autofs/special_hosts 127.0.0.1
/foo      -fstype=nullfs  :/foo /bar        -fstype=nullfs  :/bar
$ /etc/autofs/special_hosts ::1
/foo      -fstype=nullfs  :/foo /bar        -fstype=nullfs  :/bar
